name: chr3_3p21_chemokine_receptor_cluster
description: 3p21.31 CC-chemokine receptor (CCR1-CCR2-CCR3-CCR5-CCR9-XCR1-CX3CR1) gene cluster arising by tandem duplication. CCR5-delta32 is the famous HIV-resistance allele. The cluster has detectable copy-number variation in some populations.

architecture.internal_structure: Tandem CC-chemokine receptor genes CCR1, CCR2, CCR3, CCR5, CCR9, XCR1, CX3CR1 at 50-90% identity within ~1.2 Mb.
